system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike TN 7
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

This Technique must be used on a target who is willing or immobile. You attempt to help them with their problems by re-balancing their Qi energy. You make an Arm Strike TN 7. On a Success, the target’s veins glow a light blue color that illuminates an area of 10 feet for each of the target’s Qi levels. Additionally, they are calmed, and while they still have worries, they tackle all of them objectively, rather than panicking. This provides a +1d10 bonus to all Mental Skills, but a -1d10 to all Combat Skills. Both the glow and the skill effects last for 1 hour per your Ranks in Dianxue. On a Total Success, the duration doubles. However, on a Failure the target falls into even greater despair, turning the glow a dark red and suffering -1d10 to both Mental and Combat Skills for the duration. Cathartic: When used Cathartically the area of the glow doubles, and there is no penalty to Combat Skills. On a Cathartic Failure the duration still doubles and the glow becomes dark red, but the target instead becomes angry. The Skill bonuses are reversed, causing the target to take -1d10 to all Mental Skills and +1d10 to all Combat Skills. Additionally, for the duration, the target sees the user of this Technique as having made all of their problems worse, causing a change in behavior (possibly even attacking the caster).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: Must be used on a target who is willing or immobile.

On a Cathartic Failure the duration still doubles and the glow becomes dark red, but the target instead becomes angry. The Skill bonuses are reversed, causing the target to take -1d10 to all Mental Skills and +1d10 to all Combat Skills. Additionally, for the duration, the target sees the user of this Technique as having made all of their problems worse, causing a change in behavior (possibly even attacking the caster).
